backend.changelog: Download delivery now uses the CadBridge agent's native folder picker when the agent is online: pick a folder once and it is remembered across restarts with no browser permission prompt, and files go straight to that folder (no longer the browser Downloads folder). Builds on the readable document naming from the previous update.

cadBridge.changelog: Resolve virtual components by their stable child name so STEP and 3D PDF are produced for them (fixes the in-session vs BOM parent-name mismatch that left them missing on a fresh cache).
